metaDescription: GPT-5.3-Codex (OpenAI), released 2026-02-05 — part of the Codex line. Most capable agentic coding model; 400K context, 128K output, ~25% faster than 5.2-Codex.
overview: GPT-5.3-Codex is a large language model from OpenAI, part of the Codex line. Released 2026-02-05. OpenAI's coding-specialized model line, tuned for long-horizon agentic software engineering inside Codex.
What's notable in this version: Most capable agentic coding model; 400K context, 128K output, ~25% faster than 5.2-Codex.
